diagrams.title: Netflix Cloud Architecture
diagrams.description: Shows how Netflix's microservices architecture is distributed across AWS with various components
diagrams.purpose: Understanding real-world microservices implementation and cloud components

diagrams.title: Cloud Migration Phases
diagrams.description: Illustrates the typical phases of enterprise cloud migration
diagrams.purpose: Understanding structured approach to cloud migration projects

diagrams.title: Hybrid Cloud Architecture
diagrams.description: Shows on-premise infrastructure connected to public cloud with hybrid capabilities
diagrams.purpose: Understanding hybrid cloud deployment and data flow patterns

diagrams.title: Auto Scaling Architecture
diagrams.description: Demonstrates auto-scaling group configuration and scaling triggers
diagrams.purpose: Learning how elastic scaling works in cloud environments
